role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues as expected.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species and forest composition consistent with the domain.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure and guardrail standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain knowledge (camera quality, guardrail design) effectively.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Norway. The agents provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence, particularly regarding the landscape and infrastructure. The linguistic agent correctly noted the lack of signs. The final decision was well-supported by the specialists.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of frost, rock faces, and valley shape match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of mixed forest and frost match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of guardrails and road width match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Observations on image quality and guardrail style match the image.
